violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by trash and mops. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients were not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the drive-thru lowboy unit was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of some equipment observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
